ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (M/F) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "scholarship" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is on scholarship */,
  "hypertension" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has hypertension */,
  "diabetes" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has diabetes */,
  "alcoholism" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is an alcoholic */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has a handicap */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for SMS and calls */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address for postal communications */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is currently active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, no-show) */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Interval between appointments in days */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor assigned to the appointment */,
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinic where the appointment is scheduled */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the appointment in minutes */,
  "reason_for_appointment" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the appointment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the appointment was last updated */,
  "is_reminder_sent" INTEGER /* Indicates if a reminder has been sent for the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sms_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SMS notification */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the SMS was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the SMS message */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the SMS (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appointment the SMS is related to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the SMS notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the SMS notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sms_notifications_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sms_notifications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "no_show_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being analyzed */,
  "no_show_count" INTEGER /* Count of no-show appointments for the patient */,
  "last_no_show_date" TEXT /* Date of the last no-show appointment */,
  "appointment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of appointments for the patient */,
  "no_show_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of no-shows out of total appointments */,
  "last_three_months_no_show_count" INTEGER /* Number of no-shows in the last three months */,
  "last_six_months_no_show_count" INTEGER /* Number of no-shows in the last six months */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_no_show_analysis_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, receptionist) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the health condition (e.g., Hypertension, Diabetes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the health condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health condition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health condition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarship_status" (
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarship status */,
  "scholarship_name" TEXT /* Name of the scholarship status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scholarship status */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the scholarship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scholarship status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scholarship status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholarship_id")
)
